TaskDescription: [target detection] calibration-less P300-based BCI with modulation of flash duration; three game sessions (9 levels each) with different flash durations (110ms, 80ms, 50ms); resting state and eyes closed recorded before and after sessions; subjects instructed to limit eye blinks, head movements and face muscular contractions
Instructions: destroy target symbol within 8 attempts; aliens move slowly and regularly according to predefined path to maintain attention
InstitutionName: GIPSA-lab, CNRS, University Grenoble-Alpes, Grenoble INP
InstitutionAddress: GIPSA-lab, 11 rue des Mathématiques, Grenoble Campus BP46, F-38402, France
